props.children: This page tests anchor link navigation with real browser verification using Playwright.
This is the Overview section. It contains information about the anchor link testing process and methodology.

This is the Features section. Here we list all the features being tested for anchor link functionality.
Key features include: sidebar navigation, hash-based routing, smooth scrolling, URL updates, and DOM element targeting with proper IDs.

This is the Pricing section. It demonstrates anchor navigation to the bottom section of the page.
We test that clicking the Pricing link in the sidebar correctly scrolls to this section and updates the URL hash to #pricing.
